mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, name, server_type, status, config_json, config_checksum, last_health_status, last_health_message, last_checked_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM project_mcp_server WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, project_id, name, server_type, status, config_json, config_checksum, last_health_status, last_health_message, last_checked_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM project_mcp_server WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, project_id, name, server_type, status, config_json, config_checksum, last_health_status, last_health_message, last_checked_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM project_mcp_server WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND name = #{name}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_mcp_server (id, project_id, name, server_type, status, config_json, config_checksum, last_health_status, last_health_message, last_checked_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{name}, #{serverType}, #{status}, #{configJson}, #{configChecksum}, #{lastHealthStatus}, #{lastHealthMessage}, #{lastCheckedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE project_mcp_server SET server_type = #{serverType}, status = #{status}, config_json = #{configJson}, config_checksum = #{configChecksum}, last_health_status = #{lastHealthStatus}, last_health_message = #{lastHealthMessage}, last_checked_at = #{lastCheckedAt}, updated_at = (datetime('now')) WHERE id = #{id}
